name: Rules of Engagement Protocol
description: Use of force only when life is threatened or suspect poses immediate danger

name: Maximum Pursuit Duration
description: Active pursuit should not exceed 2 hours without supervisor approval

name: Evidence Chain of Custody
description: All evidence must be documented and handled per legal standards

name: Miranda Rights Notification
description: Suspects must be informed of rights upon detention

name: Medical Assessment Requirement
description: All detained individuals must receive medical screening

name: Communication Protocol Standards
description: All operational communications must use encrypted channels

name: Supervisor Authorization for Force
description: Use of force beyond verbal commands requires supervisor notification

name: Environmental Protection Standards
description: Operations should minimize environmental impact when possible

name: Privacy Protection for Witnesses
description: Civilian witness information must be protected and anonymized

name: Resource Budget Limits
description: Equipment deployment should remain within allocated budget

name: Jurisdictional Boundaries
description: Operations must respect international and inter-agency jurisdictions

name: Drone Flight Restrictions
description: UAV operations must comply with airspace regulations and altitude limits

name: K9 Deployment Safety Protocol
description: K9 units must not be exposed to situations exceeding training parameters

name: Intelligence Sharing Limitations
description: Classified information sharing must follow need-to-know and clearance protocols

name: Biometric Data Handling
description: Biometric data collection and storage must comply with privacy regulations
